title: Weak or Broken Cryptographic Primitive
description: Use of a cryptographically broken or weak algorithm (MD5, SHA-1, DES, RC4, ECB mode). These algorithms are vulnerable to collision or brute-force attacks.

finding.message: Weak cryptographic primitive '{{token}}' used in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Replace MD5/SHA-1 with SHA-256 or SHA-3 for integrity; use bcrypt, scrypt, or Argon2id for password hashing.
Replace DES/RC4 with AES-256-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 for symmetric encryption.
Never use ECB mode; prefer authenticated encryption modes (GCM, CCM).
